channel.title: Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Kantorovich inequality
item.description: The Kantorovich inequality can be stated as follows. Kantorovich inequality. Given $A \in \mathbb{C}^{n \times n}$ a Hermitian positive definite matrix whose eigenvalues are $\lambda_1 \le \lambda_2 \le \dots \le \lambda_n$, we have for any vector $x \in \mathbb{C}^n$ of unit norm $$ \langle Ax, x \rangle \langle A^{-1}x, x \rangle \le \frac{(\lambda_1 + \lambda_n)^2}{4 \lambda_1 \lambda_n}.$$
